$comment: Extensible badge catalog for the slim-badges skill. Each badge is generated via img.shields.io; a static SVG snapshot lives alongside this file. Add new badges by appending an entry that follows the same shape. Capitalization rule: title case, but the element after a hyphen stays lowercase unless it is an acronym or proper noun (e.g. 'AI-assisted', 'AI-generated').

badges.label: ✍️ 100% Human Made
badges.description: Signals a document written entirely by a human, with no AI generation.

badges.label: 🧑‍💻 AI-assisted
badges.description: Signals a human-authored document created with AI help (drafting, editing, or suggestions).

badges.label: 🤖 AI-generated
badges.description: Signals a document primarily produced by an AI model.

badges.label: Best Practices from SLIM
badges.description: Signals a project that follows SLIM (Software Lifecycle Improvement & Modernization) best practices.
